abstract: This event is Eastern Standard Time. Please adjust to your location. Event is online. Hands-on labs, leadership & lessons from AI Experts. Calling All Data Scientists, Machine Learning and Analytics Leaders. Join IBM and friends for a fun, online day of workshops, labs, tutorials, and expert sessions. Enjoy hands-on labs, 1:1 appointments with our expert speakers, get prepped for the AI Explainability hackathon going on now, learn leading new open-source tools. The event is free but you must register here to attend: http://ibm.biz/LearnAILabs
title: Community Day - Learn AI
